---
title: "recalibrate"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
# recalibrate results 

sc = 3
pair_id = 30
start = 1
stop = 11

a <- readRDS(paste0("sim_results/predictions/sc", sc, "_p", pair_id, "_", start, "_", stop,".rds"))
b <- readRDS(paste0("sim_results/per_iter_results/sc", sc, "_p", pair_id, "_", start, "_", stop,".rds"))
```

```{r}
a

```

```{r}
b
```
